sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, and any content you share on the platform. We also automatically collect certain technical data like your browser type and IP address.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your information to provide and improve our services, communicate with you, and personalize your experience. We never sell your personal information to third parties.

sections.title: 3. Data Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

sections.title: 4. Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You can also request a copy of your data or opt out of certain data processing activities.

sections.title: 5. Contact
sections.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at privacy@vibecoders.la

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using Vibecoders, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

sections.title: 2. Use of Service
sections.content: You agree to use the service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You are responsible for all content you publish on the platform.

sections.title: 3. User Content
sections.content: You retain ownership of the content you create. By publishing content, you grant us a license to display and distribute it on the platform.

sections.title: 4. Prohibited Conduct
sections.content: You may not use the service to harass others, spread malware, infringe copyrights, or engage in any illegal activity.

sections.title: 5. Termination
sections.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or for any other reason at our discretion.

sections.title: 6. Changes
sections.content: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
